text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The day's finally here, folks! The first of the Triple
Tiara races!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which of today's racers will claim the sakura
laurels and ascend the stairs to the Queen's
throne?

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
We saw sparks fly between Vodka and Daiwa
Scarlet during the Tulip Sho, and it might well
happen again today!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
This will be a showdown between the two rising
stars of the Tiara tour. It's a race you won't want
to miss!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Of course not. If anything, I'm excited.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Once I win this race, I'll be that much closer to the
top.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Not to mention, she's running in this race too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just to be clear, though—I don't care about her at
all!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The first Tiara has my name on it! I'm going to be
number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, then. Time to take the throne!
